examples.title: UTXO Transaction
examples.code:
ALGORITHM UTXO_Transaction
INPUT: sender_address, recipient_address, amount
OUTPUT: transaction_id

BEGIN
 inputs = GET_UNSPENT_OUTPUTS(sender_address)
 outputs = CREATE_OUTPUTS(recipient_address, amount)
 transaction = CREATE_TRANSACTION(inputs, outputs)
 SIGN_TRANSACTION(transaction, sender_private_key)
 BROADCAST_TRANSACTION(transaction)
 RETURN transaction_id
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic UTXO transaction, including getting unspent outputs, creating new outputs, creating and signing the transaction, and broadcasting it to the network.
